criteria.name: AI Integration Level
criteria.description: Extent to which AI features are incorporated into the app's functionality.

criteria.name: User Engagement
criteria.description: Average time users spend on the app daily.

criteria.name: User Base Size
criteria.sources: Company press releases, market research reports.

criteria.name: User Satisfaction
criteria.description: Average user rating on app stores.
criteria.sources: App Store and Google Play ratings.

criteria.name: Innovation
criteria.description: Degree of novelty in AI features compared to competitors.
